case_title: JOSHUA GOTTLIEB VS. SOPHIA SIMAS et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SOPHIA SIMAS AND NOVA COMMERCIAL COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES IS GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE (1) THAT THE MALICIOUS CONDUCT EXACERBATED PLAINTIFF'S INJURIES; AND (2) FACTS SHOWING HOW THE CORPORATE EMPLOYER IS LIABLE FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SEE CCP 3294(B). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS SOPHIA SIMAS AND NOVA COMMERCIAL COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED with 10 days leave to amend to allege (1) that the malicious conduct exacerbated plaintiff's injuries; and (2) facts showing how the corporate employer is liable for punitive damages. See CCP 3294(b). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Re Motion To Strike By Defts To Pltf'S Complaint For Damages
